description: CLI tool that validates Microsoft HTML Help Workshop (.hhp/.hhc) project files by checking for missing source files and files referenced outside the project manifest.
status: build passes, feature complete for v1

conventions.naming: Functions use snake_case with underscores for multi-word names (e.g. parse_HHP_Files_Section, Step01_ProcessFile_HHP)
conventions.file_structure: Single main.go file, no packages beyond stdlib

exit_codes.1: Usage error or missing project files
exit_codes.2: One or more files are missing

key_changes_history: Replaced all HHT references with HHC (function names, variables, string literals, file extensions)

global_state.present: files listed in HHP and found on disk
global_state.missing: files referenced but not found on disk
global_state.unlisted: files found on disk and referenced in HHC but missing from HHP [FILES] section
